title: Wa4000C Top Load Ecobubble Digital Inverter Technology Super Speed 8Kg White Wa80Ck4240Bwrt
features: Enjoy efficiency and long-lasting performance with Digital Inverter Technology. It utilizes strong magnets for a quiet and powerful performance with enhanced energy efficiency. It also provides exceptional durability, backed-up by the industry’s longest* warranty of 20 years on the motor.

Get clothes spotlessly clean, even if they are really dirty. An Intensive Wash can be used in any course* to remove stubborn stains, like blood, tea, wine, make-up or grass. It generates rich bubbles that quickly penetrate fabric** and a powerful water flow, so dirt is removed more effectively.
